d workspace
d workspace/ProjectAlpha
d workspace/ProjectAlpha/Nested
f workspace/ProjectAlpha/unchanged.txt
f workspace/ProjectAlpha/changed.txt
f workspace/ProjectAlpha/reactivated.txt
f workspace/ProjectAlpha/Nested/new_nested.txt
d incoming
f incoming/direct_file.txt
d packages
d packages/Sub
f packages/top.txt
f packages/Sub/deep.txt
d disabled
f disabled/ignored.txt
d unrelated
f unrelated/untouched.txt
